en: What do I do with all my money
That's a very good question It is a very fucking good question I buy experiences not

ko: 아주 좋은 질문이야. 경험을 사지 물건은 안 사. 추천해.

en: I kind of It's not like a life philosophy but I sort of think there's nothing I can buy in a shopping mall that I
give a fuck about in five years
ko: 인생 철학까지는 아니지만 쇼핑몰에서 살 수 있는 것 중

en: There's lots of shiny trinkets but no one gives a fuck about anything in five years time So eh stop it Go and do things See
ko: 5년 후에도 신경 쓸 만한 건 없어.

en: things do things Spend it on people you love
ko: 반짝이는 장신구는 많지만 5년 후에는 아무도 신경 안 써. 그만해. 나가서 해. 보고 겪고.

en: And when I say spend it on people you love I mean like his mum
It's a hell of an experience If I had to describe her I'd say she's a two man job
